title: Functional Core, Imperative Shell, and Production Integration · Pipeline Triage
summary: Rebuild an unreliable data-processing service as a pure decision core with explicit operational effects. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a production-shaped functional service and decision record and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Separate pure domain decisions from I/O orchestration with explicit data contracts.
Pass clocks, randomness, storage, and transport behavior through narrow callable interfaces.
Compose ingestion, validation, transformation, aggregation, and emission with bounded resource use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')

# Extend one pure, lazy, tested pipeline increment per activity.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
steps.instruction:
debug case — A local decision core receives an injected clock and storage callable. Replaying the same 4-event fixture must reproduce decisions while I/O failures stay at the imperative boundary. Competency probe: Separate pure domain decisions from I/O orchestration with explicit data contracts.

Inspect the Functional Core Shell trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
